title: Living in Boulder vlog 11-25-2018: Gunna exercise again

enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his plan to start exercising again after feeling mentally burned out from website work. He describes his website struggles (Bible texts, broken links, crashing computer), his fear of slowing progress, and his vision of becoming a fully transparent 'professional endurance athlete' who documents everything NASA-style. He outlines a strategy of enlisting his mom for encouragement and listening to audiobooks while training.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants to restart but fears it will stall website progress; stress has made it necessary
believes athletes should document everything openly — diet, distances, performance — and nobody currently does this properly
age-group athletes deserve more focus; performance should be judged within your division, not just against peak 20-somethings
fears someone will build the same thing first, making his version obsolete
believes he could live as a full-time athlete right now given low expenses and passive income
wants mom to treat exercise like a legitimate job and not warn him about overdoing it
